summary: Merchant Payment Modal Testing - ALL 4 PAYMENT METHODS WORKING. Tested MerchantPayModal with MoMo, Cash, Cashback, and Hybrid payment methods. Backend APIs verified working. Frontend UI displays all 4 payment method buttons correctly with proper enable/disable logic based on client's cashback balance.

ui_bugs.component: MerchantPayModal - Cashback selection with insufficient balance
ui_bugs.issue: When Cashback is selected and amount > balance, UI shows 'Balance after: GHS -0.88' (negative). The button is correctly disabled but selecting it still shows the info box with negative balance

seed_data_creation: None - used existing Test User SDM with GHS 0.12 cashback balance
context_for_next_testing_agent: Merchant Payment Modal with 4 payment methods fully functional. Access via: Client Dashboard > Partners tab > Select merchant > Pay This Merchant. Payment methods: 1) MoMo (blue, shows phone/network), 2) Cash (green, direct record), 3) Cashback (amber, disabled if balance < amount), 4) Hybrid (purple, shows cashback+MoMo breakdown).

modal_opens_correctly.description: Modal opens from Partners page after clicking 'Pay This Merchant' button

hybrid.button_text: Pay (GHS X CB + GHS Y MoMo)

cashback_balance_display.description: Shows 'Your Cashback Balance: GHS X.XX' in modal

cashback_button_disable_logic.description: Cashback button disabled when client balance < payment amount

backend_apis.description: Returns merchant info including cash_payment availability
Processes cashback and hybrid payments with auth required
Records cash payment and credits cashback
